subject: ephemeral SQLite FTS5 evidence-retrieval adapter

argv: import json, platform, sqlite3; connection=sqlite3.connect(':memory:'); connection.execute('CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE probe USING fts5(body)'); print(json.dumps({'python': platform.python_version(), 'sqlite': sqlite3.sqlite_version, 'fts5': True}, sort_keys=True)); connection.close()

promotion_boundary.dependency: Python standard-library sqlite3 with FTS5 enabled

semantic_contract: the adapter creates and closes one in-memory FTS5 index for the immutable observed claims supplied by a SignalPacket
the feature-owned RankedEvidenceRetriever validates every adapter match against exact source-event and claim identities
required evidence, conflicts, confidence, staleness, epistemic unknowns, typed omissions, result caps, fallback, and selection identity remain Blackcell-owned
untrusted objectives are reduced to quoted canonical terms rather than executed as raw FTS5 query syntax
SQLite and FTS5 failures fail closed with a content-free adapter error and never silently fall back
the adapter does not persist state, dual-write operational evidence, or alter canonical replay

controls.context_character_budget: identical exact integer derived before the paired bounded projection

observations: both retrievers select the same source-event and claim identity in the matched lexical fixture
both ContextFrames fit the same explicit model-payload character budget and expose the same evidence content and provenance
the FTS5 selection remains separately auditable through its fts5-objective-match reason

limitations: promotion makes FTS5 available as an explicit experiment adapter; it does not change a canonical workflow default
the matched lexical fixture establishes contract parity, not superior retrieval or downstream outcome quality
canonical replay does not yet persist retrieval-strategy identity, so injecting FTS5 into DailyOperatorV2 would be unsafe
WP23 records the matched comparison and a revise decision; live-model effects, latency distributions, and any graph or vector promotion remain unproven
deployments whose SQLite build omits FTS5 receive a typed failure and must retain the deterministic default
